commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a maintainer-triggered Crabbox PR desktop lease workflow, a Node lease/comment lifecycle script, docs, changelog text, and targeted workflow/script regression tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new maintainer automation lane. Source review and tests show the intended path, but the real workflow dispatch proof remains missing.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is required because the remaining blockers are live behavior proof, protected maintainer handling, and approval of a secret-bearing shared desktop workflow rather than a narrow code repair.

target.title: feat(crabbox): add PR desktop lease workflow
target.body:
## Summary
- add a generic Crabbox PR desktop lease workflow for maintainer-triggered Linux and macOS inspection leases
- install a pinned Crabbox CLI from `openclaw/crabbox` before leasing
- post ready/status/failure handoff comments back to the target PR without exposing WebVNC credentials
- harden lease lifecycle around stale heads, inspect failures, terminal states, duplicate creation, WebVNC bridge recovery, and PR-head race windows
- document the first-run/default-branch proof constraint for this secret-bearing workflow

## Validation
- `node --check scripts/crabbox/pr-desktop-lease.mjs`
- `node scripts/check-workflows.mjs`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/crabbox-pr-desktop-leases.md docs/concepts/mantis.md docs/docs.json`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-pr-desktop-lease.test.ts test/scripts/crabbox-pr-desktop-lease-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean before the last two race/expiry fixes; reruns after those fixes stalled in the review engine, so the two findings were fixed manually and covered with targeted tests

## Proof status
- Not ready to undraft or merge yet unless maintainers waive the live mac proof requirement.
- This is a generic Crabbox desktop lease workflow, not a Mantis QA workflow. No Mantis-prefixed secret fallbacks remain.
- GitHub cannot manually dispatch a new workflow until it exists on the default branch, so first-run workflow proof still needs a trusted default-branch deployment or an operator machine.
- Local `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm check:changed` could not run because local pnpm tried to reconcile the shared worktree `node_modules`; the direct Crabbox Testbox route then failed on missing Blacksmith auth (`blacksmith auth login`).
- Local Crabbox mac proof is blocked in this environment because AWS/Crabbox mac provider config is not available.
target.author: takhoffman
